pi_items.source: Web search and local Tier II data file analysis

pi_items.verified_value: Hydrochloric Acid is a real industrial chemical
pi_items.source: Web search for HCl storage specifications and EPA/NOAA CAMEO documentation
Local Tier II data file (epcra_tier2_data.xml) contains no such location
Verified against epcra_tier2_data.xml which contains 'Above ground tank' as a valid storage type for Fluorosilic Acid

pi_items.verified_value: 10000 gallons is realistic for industrial HCl storage
pi_items.source: Industrial HCl storage tanks range from 35-20,000 gallons per multiple storage specification sources (protank.com, ironcladenvironmental.com)

pi_items.verified_value: 6500 gallons is realistic for industrial HCl average storage
pi_items.source: Within documented industrial storage range of 35-20,000 gallons
HCl storage requires ambient/atmospheric pressure per industrial safety standards (fibrograts.com, masstank.com). HCl should never be stored under pressure.
HCl storage should be maintained between 10-30°C (50-86°F) per industrial storage standards. High temps cause HCl gas evolution and vapor pressure increase (protank.com, ironcladenvironmental.com)
EPA documentation states data is stored in 'C:\Users\Public\Documents\CAMEO Data' not 'CAMEO Data Manager'. .4DD is valid 4th Dimension database format per docs.fileformat.com and fileinfo.com

privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding a storage location record for Hydrochloric Acid to the CAMEO Data Manager application. HCl is a real industrial chemical with verified storage characteristics: ambient pressure and ambient temperature are correct per industrial standards. The max storage amount of 10,000 gallons and average of 6,500 gallons are realistic for industrial facilities (within 35-20,000 gallon range). Above-ground tank is a valid storage type. However, the facility name 'Jefferson Industrial Coatings' does not appear in public records or the Tier II test dataset, and the expected database path contains a discrepancy (includes 'Manager' in path when EPA documentation indicates the correct path is simply 'CAMEO Data' without 'Manager'). The data represents synthetic test case content not present in the actual EPCRA Tier II dataset used for environment initialization.
